course.name: AI training for consultants
course.description: Accelerate your deliverables and automate sector research with AI. Practical training for consultants, project managers and analysts.

hero.title: Accelerate your deliverables
hero.description: Research, analysis, deliverable writing — learn to use AI to move faster on low-value tasks and focus on what makes you stand out.

rows.label: Format
rows.value: Online or in person, from half a day

problemSolution.title: The friction points consultants face with AI
problemSolution.intro: Consulting is a discipline of synthesis and delivery. AI can transform your productivity — provided you master the right methods for each type of task.

rows.problem: Sector and documentary research takes a disproportionate amount of time relative to the value created.
rows.solutionDesc: Structure your research with tailored prompts and get usable summaries that you validate with your expertise.

rows.problem: Producing a structured first deliverable takes hours, even when the substance is clear.
rows.solutionDesc: Move from a scoping note to a client report with AI as your writing assistant, while keeping editorial control.

rows.problem: Benchmarks and competitive analyses take a long time to build manually.
rows.solutionDesc: Automate the collection and structuring of information to produce competitive analyses faster and more systematically.

pricing.title: Tailored pricing
pricing.description: Pricing is adapted according to duration, number of participants and your specific needs. We help you choose the right option for your firm or structure.

card.label: Tailored pricing
card.heading: Adapted to your organisation
card.subtitle: Pricing based on duration, number of participants and chosen format.

faq.title: What consultants ask before signing up

items.question: Is the training adapted to my specific sector?
items.answer: The training covers methods that apply across consulting. Practical exercises are adapted to your sector during the session. We regularly run sessions dedicated to specific sectors.

items.question: Do I need technical skills?
items.answer: No. The training is aimed at consultants and analysts, not developers. Everything is focused on business use with concrete consulting cases.

items.question: How do the sessions work?
items.answer: Sessions online or in person, in-house or in small groups. Practical exercises on real consulting cases throughout the training.

items.question: What is the difference from the AI bootcamp?
items.answer: The bootcamp is generalist (all sectors). The consultants training is specifically calibrated to consulting tasks and deliverables: research, analysis, report and presentation writing.

ctaFinal.title: Join the consultants who deliver faster with AI
ctaFinal.description: Individual training or for your consulting firm. From the first session, you have methods you can apply.
